title.ko: 원자로(핵융합로, 핵융합-분열노 G21B; 핵폭발 G21J)
title.en: NUCLEAR REACTORS (fusion reactors, hybrid fission-fusion reactors G21B;nuclear explosives G21J)

definition.ko: 원자로 G21C1/00 원자로 구성요소 연료; 감속재; 냉각; 용기; 차폐 G21C3/00; G21C5/00; G21C15/00; G21C13/00; G21C11/00 연료 또는 기타 물질의 취급 G21C19/00 제어; 모니터링, 검사 G21C7/00; G21C17/00 긴급 방호 G21C9/00 제조 G21C21/00 실험 또는 조사를 위한 원자로의 적용 G21C23/00

title.ko: 원자로의 종류
title.en: Reactor types
Fast fission reactors, i.e. reactors not using a moderator
cooled by a coolant not essentially pressurised, e.g. pool-type reactors

title.ko: 열중성자로
title.en: Thermal reactors

title.ko: 비균질로, 즉 연료의 감속재가 분리하여 있는 것
title.en: Heterogeneous reactors, i.e. in which fuel and moderator are separated
Pebble-bed reactors; Reactors with granular fuel

title.ko: 감속재가 고압으로 가압되어 있는 것, 예. 비등수형 원자로, 적분 과열형 원자로, 가압수형 원자로 (1/22가 우선)
title.en: moderator being highly pressurised, e.g. boiling-water reactor, integral-superheat reactor, pressurised-water reactor (G21C0001220000 takes precedence)
Pressure regulating arrangements, i.e. pressurisers
moderator and coolant being different or separated
moderator being solid, e.g. Magnox reactor

title.ko: 감속재가 실질적으로 가압되어 있지 않는 것, 예. 수영푸울(pool)형 원자로(1/22가 우선)
title.en: moderator being substantially not pressurised, e.g. swimming-pool reactor (G21C0001220000 takes precedence)
moderator and coolant being different or separated, e.g. sodium-graphite reactor
coolant being pressurised
moderator being liquid, e.g. pressure-tube reactor
using liquid or gaseous fuel
Homogeneous reactors, i.e. in which fuel and moderator present an effectively homogeneous medium to the neutrons
Single-region reactors
Two-region reactors
Subcritical reactors

title.ko: 적분형 원자로, 즉 기능적으로 원자로와 관련하고 있지만 반응에는 필수가 아닌 부분, 예. 열교환기의 내부에 배치되어 있는 원자로(1/02 ～ 1/30이 우선)
title.en: Integral reactors, i.e. reactors wherein parts functionally associated with the reactor but not essential to the reaction, e.g. heat exchangers, are disposed inside the enclosure with the core (G21C0001020000-G21C0001300000 take precedence)

title.ko: 원자로 연료요소 또는 그 집합체; 원자로 연료요소로 사용하기 위한 물질의 선택
title.en: Reactor fuel elements or their assemblies; Selection of substances for use as reactor fuel elements

title.ko: 연료요소
title.en: Fuel elements

title.ko: 구조의 세부
title.en: Constructional details
Casings; Jackets
characterised by their material, e.g. alloys
provided with external means to promote heat-transfer, e.g. fins, baffles, corrugations
End closures
Means forming part of the element for locating it within the reactor core; External spacers for this purpose
Means forming part of the element for inserting it into, or removing it from, the core; Means for coupling adjacent elements

title.ko: 연료피복관내의 세부구조
title.en: Details of the construction within the casing
Means for storage or immobilisation of gases in fuel elements

title.ko: 내부에 시설되는 스페이서 또는 연료피복관내의 그외의 비활성물질, 예. 연료봉의 팽창의 보상 (중간층 3/20)
title.en: Internal spacers or other non-active material within the casing, e.g. compensating for expansion of fuel rods or for compensating excess reactivity (interlayers G21C0003200000)
with coating on fuel or on inside of casing; with non-active interlayer between casing and active material
with fissile or breeder material in contact with coolant
with fissile or breeder material in fluid form within a non-active casing
with fissile or breeder material in powder form within a non-active casing
with fissile or breeder material in solid form within a non-active casing

title.ko: 고정유닛의 형상을 취하는 다수의 연료요소의 집합체
title.en: Assemblies of a number of fuel elements in the form of a rigid unit

title.ko: 평형배열의 핀(pin)상 봉상 또는 관상의 연료요소의 다발(속)
title.en: Bundles of parallel pin-, rod-, or tube-shaped fuel elements
Means to influence the coolant flow through or around the bundles
Coats or envelopes for the bundles

comprising fuel elements of different composition; Comprising, in addition to the fuel elements, other pin-, rod-, or tube-shaped elements, e.g. control rods, grid support rods, fertile rods, poison rods or dummy rods
Relative disposition of the elements in the bundle lattice

title.ko: 연료요소다발에서 연료요소를 지지하거나 현가하는 것(스페이서 격자 3/34); 노심으로부터 연료요소를 삽입하거나 제거하기 위하여 다발의 일부를 형성 하는 수단; 인접다발을 결합하기 위한 수단
title.en: Supporting or hanging of elements in the bundle (spacer grids G21C0003340000); Means forming part of the bundle for inserting it into, or removing it from, the core; Means for coupling adjacent bundles
Supports for spacer grids
Assembling the bundles
Exchanging elements in irradiated bundles

title.ko: 연료요소의 다발에서 연료봉을 위한 스페이서 요소 (스페이서 그리드 3/34)
title.en: Spacer elements for fuel rods in the bundle (spacer grids G21C0003340000)
Helicoidal spacer elements
Spacer grids
formed of assembled tubular elements
formed of assembled non-intersecting strips
formed of assembled intersecting strips
being provided with fuel element supporting members
Assemblies of plate-shaped fuel elements or coaxial tubes
Fuel units consisting of a single fuel element in a supporting sleeve

title.ko: 핵분열에 의한 열에서 직접 전기에너지를 발생시키기 위한 열전소자와 연료요소와의 조합(온도 조정 장치를 구비한 연료요소의 구조적 결합 G21C 17/112)
title.en: Structural combination of fuel element with thermoelectric element for direct production of electric energy from fission heat (structural combination of fuel element with instruments for temperature measurement G21C0017112000)
Selection of substances for use as reactor fuel
Fluid or fluent reactor fuel
Aqueous compositions
True or colloidal solutions of the active constituent
Suspensions of the active constituent; Slurries
Liquid metal compositions
Fused salt, oxide, or hydroxide compositions
Gaseous compositions; Suspensions in a gaseous carrier
Solid reactor fuel
Metallic fuel; Intermetallic dispersions
Ceramic fuel
Ceramic dispersion fuel, e.g. cermet
Moderator or core structure; Selection of materials for use as moderator
Details
Spatial arrangements allowing for Wigner growth
Means for locating or supporting fuel elements
Means for preventing undesired asymmetric expansion of the complete structure
Means for supporting the complete structure
characterised by composition, e.g. the moderator containing additional substances which ensure improved heat resistance of the moderator
characterised by shape
Shape of its constituent parts
characterised by the provision of more than one active zone
wherein one zone contains fissile material and another zone contains breeder material
wherein one zone is a superheating zone

title.ko: 원자핵반응의 제어
title.en: Control of nuclear reaction

title.ko: 원자로재료의 자기 제어성을 사용하는 것 (온도안정성이 있는 배치 7/32)
title.en: by using self-regulating properties of reactor materials (arrangements that involve temperature stability G21C0007320000)

title.ko: 가연성 독물을 사용하는 것(연료봉에 있어서 가연성 독물 3/326)
title.en: of burnable poisons (burnable poisons in fuel rods G21C0003326000)

title.ko: 중성자 흡수재의 적용에 의한 것, 즉. 산란 단면적보다도 훨씬 큰 흡수면적을 지니는 재료
title.en: by application of neutron-absorbing material, i.e. material with absorption cross-section very much in excess of reflection cross-section

title.ko: 고체제어요소의 변위에 의한 것, 예. 제어봉
title.en: by displacement of solid control elements, e.g. control rods
Construction of control elements
Control assemblies containing one or more absorbants as well as other elements, e.g. fuel or moderator elements
Control elements adapted for pebble-bed reactors
Deformable control elements, e.g. flexible, telescopic, articulated
Control elements made of flat elements; Control elements having cruciform cross-section
Clusters of control rods; Spider construction

title.ko: 제어요소를 소망의 위치에 이동시키는 수단 (긴급상황에서 제어봉을 반응로에 강하하는 것 G21C 9/02)
title.en: Means for moving control elements to desired position (dropping control rods into the reactor core in an emergency G21C0009020000)
Mechanical drive arrangements
Hydraulic or pneumatic drive arrangements
Means for obtaining differential movement of control elements
Disposition of shock-absorbing devices
by displacement of a fluid or fluent neutron-absorbing material
Selection of substances for use as neutron-absorbing material
by displacement of the moderator or parts thereof
Spectral shift control
by displacement of the reflector or parts thereof
by displacement of reactor fuel or fuel elements
by varying flow of coolant through the core
by utilisation of a primary neutron source
Control circuits

title.ko: 원자로와 구조상 관련하는 긴급방호를 위한 구성 (긴급냉각을 위한 구성 15/18)
title.en: Emergency protection arrangements structurally associated with the reactor (emergency cooling arrangements G21C0015180000)
Pressure suppression
by rupture-discs or -diaphragms
by thermal accumulation or by steam condensation, e.g. ice condensers
Core catchers
Means for effecting very rapid reduction of the reactivity factor under fault conditions, e.g. reactor fuse
by fast movement of a solid, e.g. pebbles
by an absorbent fluid
Means for suppressing fires
Means for preventing accumulation of explosives gases, e.g. recombiners
Shielding structurally associated with the reactor
Biological shielding
on waterborne craft
Reflecting shields, i.e. for minimising loss of neutrons
Thermal shields; Thermal linings, i.e. for dissipating heat from gamma radiation which would otherwise heat an outer biological shield
Pressure vessels; Containment vessels; Containment in general
Details
Supporting constructions for pressure vessels or containment vessels
Seals, e.g. for pressure vessels or containment vessels
Joints between tubes and vessel walls, e.g. taking into account thermal stresses
the tube passing through the vessel wall, i.e. continuing on both sides of the wall
Arrangements for expansion and contraction
Sealing-plugs
for tubes, e.g. standpipes; Locking devices for plugs
Closures for reactor-vessels, e.g. rotatable
Vessels characterised by the material; Selection of materials for pressure vessels
Metallic vessels
Concrete vessels
Means for preventing contamination in event of leakage

title.ko: 노심을 지니는 압력용기내의 냉각계 특정의 냉각재의 선택
title.en: Cooling arrangements within the pressure vessel containing the core; Selection of specific coolants
Arrangement or disposition of passages in which heat is transferred to the coolant, e.g. for coolant circulation through the supports of the fuel elements
from fissile or breeder material
in fuel elements
from moderating material
from reflector or thermal shield
from pressure vessel; from containment vessel
from ducts conducting a hot fluid; from ducts comprising auxiliary apparatus, e.g. pumps, cameras
comprising means for separating liquid and steam
Emergency cooling arrangements; Removing shut-down heat
Partitions or thermal insulation between fuel channel and moderator, e.g. in pressure tube reactors
Structural association of coolant tubes with headers or other pipes, e.g. in pressure tube reactors
Promoting flow of the coolant
for liquids
for liquid metals
using jet pumps
for gases, e.g. blowers
using heat-pipes
by convection, e.g. using chimneys, using divergent channels

title.ko: 특정의 냉각재의 선택(감속재로서 사용되고 있는 경우 G21C 5/12)
title.en: Selection of specific coolants (if serving as the moderator G21C0005120000)

title.ko: 감시; 시험
title.en: Monitoring; Testing
Remote inspection of vessels, e.g. pressure vessels
Inspection of the outer surfaces of vessels
Inspection of the inner surfaces of vessels
Inspection vehicles
Inspection or maintenance of pipe-lines or tubes in nuclear installations
Devices or arrangements for monitoring coolant or moderator
for monitoring liquid coolants or moderators
for monitoring liquid metal coolants
for monitoring gaseous coolants
Reactor-coolant flow measuring or monitoring
Moderator- or coolant-level detecting devices
Boiling detection in moderator or coolant
Detecting burst slugs

title.ko: 노심 외에 연료 또는 연료요소를 감시 또는 검사하기 위한 장치 또는 배치, 예. 완전 연소, 오염에 대한 것 (G21C17/08, G21C17/10 이 우선; 반응기 작동중 연료의 누설을 감지하는 것 G21C17/04)
title.en: Devices or arrangements for monitoring or testing fuel or fuel elements outside the reactor core, e.g. for burn-up, for contamination (G21C0017080000, G21C0017100000 take precedence;detecting leaking fuel elements during reactor operation G21C0017040000)
Leak testing
Structural combination of reactor core or moderator structure with viewing means, e.g. with television camera, periscope, window
Structural combination of fuel element, control rod, reactor core, or moderator structure with sensitive instruments, e.g. for measuring radioactivity, strain
Measuring reactivity
Measuring reactor flux
Measuring temperature
Passages or insulators, e.g. for electric cables
Sensitive element forming part of control element
Period meters

title.ko: 원자로내, 예. 그 압력용기내에서 사용되는 연료 또는 기타 물질의 처리, 취급 또는 취급을 용이하게 하기 위한 수단
title.en: Arrangements for treating, for handling, or for facilitating the handling of, fuel or other materials which are used within the reactor, e.g. within its pressure vessel
Details of handling arrangements
Means for controlling flow of coolant over objects being handled; Means for controlling flow of coolant through channel being serviced
Means for supporting or storing fuel elements or control elements
Storage racks; Storage pools
Means for heating fuel elements before introduction into the core; Means for heating or cooling fuel elements after removal from the core
Lifting devices or pulling devices adapted for co-operation with fuel elements or with control elements
with grasping or spreading coupling elements
with revolving coupling elements, e.g. socket coupling
with latching devices and ball couplings
Arrangements for exerting direct hydraulic or pneumatic force on fuel element or on control element
characterised by their adaptation for use with horizontal channels in the reactor core
Articulated or telescopic chutes or tubes for connection to channels in the reactor core
Apparatus for bringing fuel elements to the reactor charge area, e.g. from a storage place
Reactor parts specifically adapted to facilitate handling, e.g. to facilitate charging or discharging of fuel elements
Arrangements for introducing objects into the pressure vessel; Arrangements for handling objects within the pressure vessel; Arrangements for removing objects from the pressure vessel
Arrangements for obtaining access to the interior of a pressure vessel whilst the reactor is operating
by using an auxiliary vessel which is temporarily sealed to the pressure vessel
Arrangements for removing jammed or damaged fuel elements or control elements; Arrangements for moving broken parts thereof

title.ko: 유체상 물질을 노심내에 도입하기 위한 구성; 노심에서 유체물질을 꺼내기 위한 구성
title.en: Arrangements for introducing fluent material into the reactor core; Arrangements for removing fluent material from the reactor core

title.ko: 순환하는 유체물질을 예를 들면 핵분열생성물의 추출에 의해 연속적으로 정화하는 것
title.en: with continuous purification of circulating fluent material, e.g. by extraction of fission products

title.ko: 특히 기체용에 적합한 것(기체의 오염제거 G21F 9/02)
title.en: specially adapted for gases (decontamination of gases G21F0009020000)

title.ko: 특히 액체에 적합한 것(액체의 오염제거 G21F 9/04)
title.en: specially adapted for liquids (decontamination of liquids G21F0009040000)
for molten metals
using cold traps
Recombination devices for radiolytic dissociation products

title.ko: 방사선물체 또는 물질의 원자로의 취출영역으로부터 예를 들면 저장소에 이송하기 위한 장치; 방사성물체 또는 재료를 저장소내에서 취급하든가 또는 저장소에서 꺼내는 장치(폐기물처리 G21F 9/00)
title.en: Apparatus for removing radioactive objects or materials from the reactor discharge area, e.g. to a storage place; Apparatus for handling radioactive objects or materials within a storage place or removing them therefrom (disposal of waste material G21F0009000000)

title.ko: 사용후 연료요소의 스트링(string)을 분해하는 장치 또는 방법(19/34가 우선)
title.en: Apparatus or processes for dismantling strings of spent fuel elements (G21C0019340000 takes precedence)
Apparatus or processes for dismantling nuclear fuel, e.g. before reprocessing
Mechanical means only
Removing cannings or casings from fuel
by separating into pieces both the canning or the casing and the fuel element, e.g. by cutting or shearing
Compacting devices, e.g. for fuel assemblies
Chemical means only
Arrangements for preventing occurrence of critical conditions, e.g. during storage
Reprocessing of irradiated fuel
of irradiated solid fuel
Aqueous processes
Non-aqueous processes
of irradiated fluid fuel

title.ko: 원자로 또는 그 부분품의 제조를 위하여 특히 사용되는 장치 또는 방법
title.en: Apparatus or processes specially adapted to the manufacture of reactors or parts thereof
Manufacture of fuel elements or breeder elements contained in non-active casings
by vibrational compaction or tamping
by swaging
by a slip-fit cladding process
by extrusion, drawing, or stretching
by hydrostatic or thermo-pneumatic canning
by plating in a fluid
by casting or dipping techniques

title.ko: 그룹 7/00에 속하는 제어요소의 제조
title.en: Manufacture of control elements covered by group G21C0007000000
Adaptations of reactors to facilitate experimentation or irradiation
